g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does GitHub trigger the Jenkins pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does Jenkins do when it receives the webhook?')
sendPrompt('What does the install stage do?')
sendPrompt('What does the lint stage check?')
sendPrompt('What does the test stage run?')
sendPrompt('How does Jenkins build and push to ECR?')
sendPrompt('How does Jenkins deploy with Docker Compose?')
sendPrompt('What images are stored in ECR?')
sendPrompt('What is in the Docker Compose stack?')

svg.text: App exposes /metrics · Prometheus scrapes · Grafana dashboards socket + HTTP metrics
